_comment: A-Wiki provider registry — single source of truth for LLM providers. Adding a provider = ONE entry here (no new bash). PUBLIC-SAFE: store env var NAMES only, NEVER key values (keys live in drive/.secrets). 'api_style' picks the request shape (openai|gemini|anthropic). 'via' routes through another provider until the provider's own auth_env is set + enabled:true.

openrouter.label: OpenRouter
openrouter.notes: Aggregator; free + paid models. z-ai/glm-4.6, deepseek, qwen, llama all reachable here.

zai.label: Z.ai (GLM)
zai.notes: GLM-5.1 = flagship (primary); glm-4.5-air = cheap/fast (secondary). Direct route (no OpenRouter markup) when ZHIPU_API_KEY is in env — env name matches delegate.sh try_zhipu_direct + drive/.secrets. Verified available ids 2026-06-16 via GET /models: glm-5.1, glm-5, glm-4.7, glm-5-turbo, glm-4.6, glm-4.5, glm-4.5-air. NOTE: 'glm-5.2' is NOT exposed on the direct API (Codeplan-only alias); use glm-5.1 for direct harness calls. delegate.sh seed stays glm-4.6 for test-compat — pin glm-5.1 via dashboard ⚙️ or ZHIPU_DIRECT_MODEL=glm-5.1.

gemini.label: Google AI Studio (Gemini)
gemini.notes: Direct free tier (~1500 req/day). GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_KEY is aliased to GEMINI_API_KEY by load-drive-keys.sh.

groq.label: Groq
groq.notes: Direct free tier, very high rate limit, fast. Good secondary lane for scan/latency-sensitive work.

deepseek.label: DeepSeek
deepseek.notes: Cheap reasoning (deepseek-chat) + deepseek-reasoner. Pricing volatile — confirm via scout.

anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.notes: Paid quality escalation only (Haiku low tier). Harness uses as last resort; primary-agent tiers (4a-4c) are subscription, not API.
